normalization.notes: Store IPA transcriptions in NFC while preserving source notation. Combining marks and modifier letters need grapheme-cluster aware rendering checks.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: IPA base symbols, modifier letters, stress marks, length marks, and selected affricate or diphthong chunks
segmentation.notes: IPA has no word segmentation problem inside a transcription, but pedagogical units may combine base symbols with modifier letters or stress marks.
